candidates.title: Europe Bridge Release Persistence Expansion
candidates.thesis: Restore the bridge hour to the release-persistence thesis, but only when volatility stays high and the move is still extending cleanly enough to justify continuation without waiting for a reset. candidates.title: Europe Core Cost-Guard Release Persistence
candidates.thesis: Keep the release-persistence thesis inside the core pre-overlap block and raise the expansion quality bar so the family can stay orthogonal to late weak drift and spread-heavy bridge noise. Corpus anchor: SRC-003: Always remember Wyckoff's second law, the law of cause and effect. If the cause is large, then this will be reflected in the effect, which applies to support and resistance. candidates.title: Europe Release Persistence Expansion Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Trade Europe-open directional continuation only when the initial release is already expanding cleanly, volatility stays elevated, and the move is persisting rather than resetting into a pullback geometry.
